prompt_en: A severe certified passage ending where frost-covered checkpoint lights hold steady, stamped papers pass one by one, and exhausted survivors cross under rules that still exclude too many. radio mast, cold storage, sea fog, archival realism, delayed guilt. frosted checkpoint lights, stamped papers, measured survivor line, cold wire barriers. Grounded Korean apocalypse cinematic realism.
prompt_ko_context: 정식 인증으로 통과를 성사시킨 엔딩. 질서는 유지되지만 손실이 명확해야 한다.
camera_notes: Hold on the ritual of authentication, then reveal who is still standing outside the line.
audio_notes: Wind through fencing, stamp clicks, low synth drone, restrained footsteps.
stitch_prompt: A severe certified passage ending where frost-covered checkpoint lights hold steady, stamped papers pass one by one, and exhausted survivors cross under rules that still exclude too many. Match style pack P3.ending.p3_end_certified_passage.
